name: Hedge Broodmother

attacks.name: Basic bite
attacks.tell: Descends from the ceiling and bites after landing
attacks.howToAvoid: Attack as soon as it hits the ground, or move away as it descends
attacks.notes: He cannot be harmed while coming down from the roof. This initial bite marks the beginning of the fight

attacks.name: Arachnid Combo
attacks.tell: Perform the 3-hit combination of the Orb Weaver and then a jump similar to that of the Wolf Spider
attacks.howToAvoid: Block the first 3 consecutive bites, then dodge the final jump
attacks.notes: Multiple attack that combines patterns from other spiders; can poison with every bite

attacks.name: Summoning Roar
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A (you can't dodge the sound effect, but you can block the debuff with a perfect block)
attacks.notes: When roaring in phase 2, summons 7 Spiderlings from the ceiling and applies a damage debuff to the player (player attacks do less damage)

attacks.name: Agile Dodge
attacks.tell: Makes a hiss and jumps back quickly
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A (it's a move from her, not an attack on you)
attacks.notes: Happens in Phase 2: Broodmother jumps away to reposition herself, dealing small damage and applying -Exhaustion Recovery if she hits you while jumping

attacks.name: Poisoned Pounce
attacks.tell: In later phases, performs a quick pounce similar to the Wolf Spider but with intense venom
attacks.howToAvoid: Treat as normal jump but be aware that even a partial block will poison you
attacks.notes: In phase 3, all of his attacks can apply poison. This pounce is especially dangerous combined with his increased mid-life resistance.

attacks.name: Summoning Reinforcements
attacks.tell: At 50% health, screech again and spawn 4 additional Spiderlings and 2 Orb Weaver Jr.
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A (be prepared to deal with the adds); Focus first on eliminating the summoned Orb Weaver Jr.
attacks.notes: In phase 3 (50% health), in addition to increasing its resistances to almost half the damage, it brings more offspring to overwhelm the player

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.summary: The Broodmother opens with her base kit: quick bites, the spider combo, and a rhythm that is still readable if you respect her pauses.
bossPhases.trigger: It starts when she descends from the ceiling and lands in the arena.

attacks.name: Basic bite
attacks.tell: Descends from the ceiling and bites after landing
attacks.howToAvoid: Attack as soon as it hits the ground, or move away as it descends
attacks.notes: He cannot be harmed while coming down from the roof. This initial bite marks the beginning of the fight

attacks.name: Arachnid Combo
attacks.tell: Perform the 3-hit combination of the Orb Weaver and then a jump similar to that of the Wolf Spider
attacks.howToAvoid: Block the first 3 consecutive bites, then dodge the final jump
attacks.notes: Multiple attack that combines patterns from other spiders; can poison with every bite

attacks.name: Charged Pounce
attacks.tell: She crouches for a moment and then launches herself in a straight line with her whole body.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge sideways at the last moment; backpedaling in a straight line is usually not enough.
attacks.notes: This is her clearest punish against players who fight too far away without cutting the angle.

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.summary: The fight stops being just a duel. Her roar enters the rotation, player damage drops, and the ceiling starts feeding spiderlings into the arena during the transition.
bossPhases.trigger: She enters at 75% health with a scream that opens the first add wave.
newPatterns: Spiderlings drop from the ceiling during the transition and break the one-on-one flow.

attacks.name: Basic bite
attacks.tell: Descends from the ceiling and bites after landing
attacks.howToAvoid: Attack as soon as it hits the ground, or move away as it descends
attacks.notes: He cannot be harmed while coming down from the roof. This initial bite marks the beginning of the fight

attacks.name: Arachnid Combo
attacks.tell: Perform the 3-hit combination of the Orb Weaver and then a jump similar to that of the Wolf Spider
attacks.howToAvoid: Block the first 3 consecutive bites, then dodge the final jump
attacks.notes: Multiple attack that combines patterns from other spiders; can poison with every bite

attacks.name: Summoning Roar
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A (you can't dodge the sound effect, but you can block the debuff with a perfect block)
attacks.notes: When roaring in phase 2, summons 7 Spiderlings from the ceiling and applies a damage debuff to the player (player attacks do less damage)

attacks.name: Agile Dodge
attacks.tell: Makes a hiss and jumps back quickly
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A (it's a move from her, not an attack on you)
attacks.notes: Happens in Phase 2: Broodmother jumps away to reposition herself, dealing small damage and applying -Exhaustion Recovery if she hits you while jumping

bossPhases.label: Phase 3
bossPhases.summary: Her resistance rises and so does the physical pressure. Good blocking is no longer enough: now you need to punish lightly and clear adds before the room disappears.
bossPhases.trigger: She enters at 50% health with a more aggressive transition and fresh summons.
newPatterns: The summons stop being background noise and start defining where you are actually allowed to fight.

attacks.name: Poisoned Pounce
attacks.tell: In later phases, performs a quick pounce similar to the Wolf Spider but with intense venom
attacks.howToAvoid: Treat as normal jump but be aware that even a partial block will poison you
attacks.notes: In phase 3, all of his attacks can apply poison. This pounce is especially dangerous combined with his increased mid-life resistance.

attacks.name: Summoning Reinforcements
attacks.tell: At 50% health, screech again and spawn 4 additional Spiderlings and 2 Orb Weaver Jr.
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A (be prepared to deal with the adds); Focus first on eliminating the summoned Orb Weaver Jr.
attacks.notes: In phase 3 (50% health), in addition to increasing its resistances to almost half the damage, it brings more offspring to overwhelm the player

attacks.name: Agile Dodge
attacks.tell: Makes a hiss and jumps back quickly
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A (it's a move from her, not an attack on you)
attacks.notes: Happens in Phase 2: Broodmother jumps away to reposition herself, dealing small damage and applying -Exhaustion Recovery if she hits you while jumping

bossPhases.label: Phase 4
bossPhases.summary: The final phase is the dirtiest one: her damage stays high, the punish windows shrink, and the summons shift toward more dangerous adds, usually Orb Weaver Jrs. instead of simple spiderlings.
bossPhases.trigger: She enters at 25% health for the most aggressive finish of the fight.
newPatterns: The last phase rewards patience: overcommitting usually traps you between the boss and her adds.

attacks.name: Basic bite
attacks.tell: Descends from the ceiling and bites after landing
attacks.howToAvoid: Attack as soon as it hits the ground, or move away as it descends
attacks.notes: He cannot be harmed while coming down from the roof. This initial bite marks the beginning of the fight

description: The queen of hedge spiders and one of the first truly serious optional bosses in the yard. She is summoned with a Broodmother BLT inside her hedge lair.
behavior: It opens with familiar large-spider patterns, but every phase adds harsher punishments, more summons, and more poison pressure. As its health drops, it shifts away from spiderlings and leans harder on Orb Weaver Jr reinforcements.
interactionWithPlayer: It is immediately hostile and locks players inside the lair once the encounter starts. Missing perfect blocks on its screams or heavier lunges can make the fight drag out badly.
interactionWithCreatures: It summons Spiderlings and Orb Weaver Jrs as a core part of the fight. All of its minions vanish the moment the Broodmother dies.
strategy: Spicy plus slashing remains the strongest line. You can ignore part of the minion pressure if your damage is very high, but in longer fights AoE or crowd control matters a lot to avoid being surrounded.
respawnInfo: Repeatable with a Broodmother BLT. The lair exit seals during the fight.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 90
3-hit combo: 80
5-hit combo: 75
Charged pounce: 120
Jump attack: 100
Dodge: 110
Scream: 30
